title: Repository Index Contract
summary: Defines the external `.index/` run, manifest, and entry contracts plus the repository-level validator entrypoint.
responsibility: Own the machine-readable shape for repository indexing and keep `.index/` explicitly outside verification authority.

inputs.name: repository structure
inputs.description: Stable directories, contracts, and entrypoints inspected by external indexing tooling.

inputs.name: refresh scope
inputs.description: Full-repo or scoped paths declared in the run contract.

outputs.name: run metadata
outputs.description: Top-level record for one indexing execution.

outputs.name: manifest and entries
outputs.description: Machine-readable entry inventory and per-entry architectural summaries.

external_dependencies.name: jsonschema
external_dependencies.notes: Used by the `.index/` validator to enforce contract conformance.

public_interfaces.name: validate_repository_index.py
public_interfaces.notes: Validates run, manifest, and entry payloads plus scoped refresh boundaries.

review_hints: Check that scoped runs do not point outside declared paths.
Review example payloads together with the validator.
